name: runesmith-sprint
description: [RuneSmith] Atlassian sprint workflow + Cowork↔CC interconnect. /enable wires Atlassian into a project (CLAUDE.md updates, CC-side skill deployment), /start-sprint and /sprint-status manage the active sprint handshake, /check-comms triages the comms folder, /plan-to-tickets converts plans into Jira tickets organized by sprint. CC reads sprints via read-only REST while mutations route through Cowork.
